sys_atf_schedule.description:
This schedule will perform the following actions:
Run suite 'CI/CD Test Suite' on a system with this configuration: Any browser on any version Any operating system on any version
sys_atf_schedule.name: CICD adhoc schedule

sys_update_version.name: sys_atf_schedule_19e0bf8ee06332107f44e12a437669ac
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_atf_schedule"><sys_atf_schedule action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><business_calendar/><condition/><conditional>false</conditional><description>This schedule will perform the following actions:
Run suite 'CI/CD Test Suite' on a system with this configuration: Any browser on any version Any operating system on any version</description><entered_time/><max_drift/><name>CICD adhoc schedule</name><offset/><offset_type>0</offset_type><performance_test>false</performance_test><run_as display_value="System Administrator">6816f79cc0a8016401c5a33be04be441</run_as><run_as_tz/><run_dayofmonth>1</run_dayofmonth><run_dayofweek/><run_in_cloud>false</run_in_cloud><run_period/><run_start>2026-03-12 15:21:13</run_start><run_time/><run_type>on_demand</run_type><script><![CDATA[new global.ScheduledTestProcessor().executeScheduledSuites('19e0bf8ee06332107f44e12a437669ac');]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_atf_schedule</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-03-12 15:21:13</sys_created_on><sys_id>19e0bf8ee06332107f44e12a437669ac</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>CICD adhoc schedule</sys_name><sys_package display_value="CI/CD Demo App" source="x_442667_ci_cd_d_0">a67a56f5c3e376505e811c84e4013121</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="CI/CD Demo App">a67a56f5c3e376505e811c84e4013121</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_atf_schedule_19e0bf8ee06332107f44e12a437669ac</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-03-12 15:21:13</sys_updated_on><time_zone/><upgrade_safe>false</upgrade_safe></sys_atf_schedule></record_update>
